description_long: This object is a vibrant cluster of stylized flowers and foliage, featuring large, white petals with purple centers and yellow stamens. The flowers are surrounded by a mix of green, yellow, and pink lanceolate leaves, creating a lush and colorful arrangement. The petals are broad and slightly overlapping, radiating symmetrically from the center of each bloom. The foliage is dense and layered, with some leaves arching outward and others tucked beneath the flowers. The overall composition suggests a decorative, ornamental plant suitable for urban parks, gardens, or sidewalk planters. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with a soft, organic texture typical of fresh plant material.
description: A lush, colorful cluster of large white flowers with purple centers, surrounded by green, yellow, and pink lanceolate leaves. The arrangement is dense and ornamental, with overlapping petals and layered foliage.
description_view_0: This view highlights three prominent white flowers with purple centers, surrounded by yellow and pink leaves, with the foliage appearing dense and layered.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central white flower is most visible, with pink leaves more prominent on the right and yellow leaves on the left, giving a balanced, colorful appearance.
description_view_2: The largest white flower dominates the foreground, with green and yellow leaves fanning out below and pink leaves to the left, emphasizing the radial symmetry.
description_view_3: This view shows the white flower slightly off-center, with yellow leaves in the foreground and green leaves to the left, highlighting the layered foliage.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, with each flower displaying symmetrical, overlapping petals radiating from a central point. The arrangement is regular and layered, typical of many ornamental flowers.
